# @iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk

Full Iruka Mini Game SDK với React adapter, Phaser integration, và audio utilities.

## Installation

```bash
# Configure GitHub Packages registry
echo "@iruka-edu:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com" >> .npmrc

# Install
pnpm add @iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk
```

## Quick Start

### 1. Using BaseGame (Recommended)

The easiest way to create an Iruka game is by extending `BaseGame`:

```typescript
import { BaseGame, type LaunchContext } from "@iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk";
import Phaser from "phaser";

export class MyGame extends BaseGame {
  private game: Phaser.Game | null = null;

  /**
   * Called after successful hub connection and validation
   */
  protected async onInit(context: LaunchContext): Promise<void> {
    console.log("🎮 Game initialized with context:", context);
    
    // Create your Phaser game
    this.game = new Phaser.Game({
      type: Phaser.AUTO,
      width: 800,
      height: 600,
      scene: [MainScene],
      plugins: {
        global: [createIrukaPluginConfig()] // Enable Iruka plugin
      }
    });
  }

  protected async onStart(): Promise<void> {
    console.log("🚀 Game started");
    // Optional: Additional setup after game starts
  }
}

// Launch your game
new MyGame();
```

### 2. Using Phaser Plugin

Access SDK functionality directly in your Phaser scenes:

```typescript
export class MainScene extends Phaser.Scene {
  create() {
    // Access SDK via this.iruka
    const context = (this as any).iruka.getContext();
    console.log("Player:", context.player?.name);
    
    // Setup click handler
    this.input.on('pointerdown', () => {
      (this as any).iruka.submitScore(100, 10);
    });
    
    // Complete game
    this.input.keyboard?.on('keydown-SPACE', () => {
      (this as any).iruka.completeGame({
        score: 100,
        timeMs: 30000
      });
    });
  }
}
```

## Advanced Usage

### React Adapter

```tsx
import { IrukaGameHost } from "@iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk";

function App() {
  return (
    <IrukaGameHost
      gameUrl="https://cdn.iruka.games/games/memory-game/1.0.0/index.html"
      context={{
        sessionId: "session-123",
        gameId: "memory-game",
        locale: "vi",
        difficulty: "medium",
      }}
      onReady={() => console.log("Game ready")}
      onComplete={(result) => console.log("Score:", result.score)}
      onError={(error) => console.error("Error:", error)}
    />
  );
}
```

### Manual Bridge Setup (Advanced)

```typescript
import { createIframeBridge, type HubCommand } from "@iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk";

const bridge = createIframeBridge((cmd: HubCommand) => {
  switch (cmd.type) {
    case "INIT":
      console.log("Context:", cmd.payload);
      break;
    case "START":
      startGame();
      break;
  }
});

bridge.ready(["score", "progress"]);
bridge.score(100);
bridge.complete({ score: 100, timeMs: 60000 });
```

### UI Overlay Manager

```typescript
import { OverlayManager } from "@iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk";

const ui = new OverlayManager();

// Show loading
ui.showLoading();

// Show result screen
ui.showResult(100, 3, () => {
  console.log("Retry clicked");
});

// Show error
ui.showError("Connection failed", "NETWORK_ERROR");

// Hide overlay
ui.hide();
```

### Auto-Save Manager

```typescript
import { AutoSaveManager } from "@iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk";

const autoSave = new AutoSaveManager();

// Start auto-saving every 30 seconds
autoSave.start();

// Save manually
autoSave.saveState({
  level: 3,
  score: 150,
  inventory: ["sword", "potion"]
});

// Stop auto-saving
autoSave.stop();
```

## API Reference

### BaseGame

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `onInit(context)` | Called after successful hub connection |
| `onStart()` | Called when game should start |
| `bridge` | Access to game bridge |
| `context` | Launch context from hub |
| `ui` | Overlay manager instance |

### IrukaPlugin (Phaser)

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `submitScore(score, delta?)` | Submit score update |
| `submitProgress(current, total)` | Submit progress update |
| `completeGame(result)` | Complete game with result |
| `saveState(payload)` | Save game state |
| `loadState()` | Load saved state |
| `getContext()` | Get launch context |
| `track(event, data?)` | Send telemetry event |

### OverlayManager

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `showLoading()` | Show loading screen |
| `showResult(score, stars, onRetry)` | Show result screen |
| `showError(message, code?)` | Show error screen |
| `hide()` | Hide all overlays |

## Core Re-exports

All exports from `@iruka-edu/game-core` are available:

```typescript
import {
  // Bridge functions
  createIframeBridge,
  createHubBridge,
  
  // Validation
  validateManifest,
  normalizeResult,
  
  // Types
  type GameManifest,
  type LaunchContext,
  type HubCommand,
  type GameEvent,
} from "@iruka-edu/mini-game-sdk";
```

## Exports

| Export | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `BaseGame` | Base class for games |
| `IrukaPlugin` | Phaser plugin for SDK access |
| `createIrukaPluginConfig()` | Helper for plugin registration |
| `IrukaGameHost` | React component for embedding games |
| `OverlayManager` | UI overlay management |
| `AutoSaveManager` | Automatic state saving |
| `*` | All exports from @iruka-edu/game-core |

## Peer Dependencies

```json
{
  "react": "^18",
  "react-dom": "^18", 
  "phaser": "^3.80.0"
}
```
